Dear Customer, Greetings from HDFC Bank! There is an upcoming E-mandate (Auto payment) of INR 16.56 for Google Cloud. Amount will be debited from your HDFC Bank Credit Card ending 5678 on 04/04/2026. SI Hub ID: KLMNOPQRST To manage your E-mandates, please visit: https://www.sihub.in/managesi/hdfcbank Note: Recurring payments will continue even if Online Transactions are turned off on your card. Thank you for banking with us. Warm regards, HDFC Bank
